Faculty of Social and Behavioral Sciences

notes: HU's official graduate catalog lists graduate tuition at USD 455 per credit hour.
The tuition-fees page confirms tuition is reviewed annually and that payment/installment arrangements are term-based.
MBA emphases remain concentrations under one MBA record; the MA in Psychology catalogs its areas of emphasis as concentrations within a single degree.
